info.name: Workday Integration Workday Time Tracking API
Workday Integration Create a time clock event

items.docs: Records a time clock event such as a clock-in or clock-out for a worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve time validation results

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns time validation results for worker time entries, identifying errors and warnings that need to be resolved.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve worker time blocks

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns a collection of time blocks representing worked hours for workers.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific worker time block

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified worker time block with start and end times.

info.name: Workday Integration Create a time review event for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Initiates a time review event for the specified worker to approve or adjust time entries.
